name: mono
description: Persistent experiment memory and run tracking for autonomous research agents.

interface.shortDescription: Shared experiment memory for research agents
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a self-hosted Mono instance. Retrieve prior evidence, coordinate experiments, record outcomes, and generate safe project-scoped RTVis visualizations through the bundled MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repository for reliable Mono experiment tracking
Review prior evidence, run one experiment, and record its outcome in Mono
Generate a visualization for this data in Mono
